calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corp.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Luis Rivera as follows:
Principal $48,658.05
Interest $1,333.33
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $335.50, for a total of $52,826.55
Judgment signed in open court.
